title: megalastrum oreophilum
intro: Megalastrum oreophilum, also known as the mountain fern, is a type of plant species belonging to the family Ophioglossaceae, characterized by its unique fern-like leaves. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Megalastrum oreophilum include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been reported to aid in the treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the rhizome of the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be taken to harness its medicinal properties.
